_doc.policy: Each entry declares: an endpoint (path + method) and a list of fields the frontend reads. CI validates backend's committed openapi.json still provides those fields. If the backend drops a declared field, CI fails.
_doc.adding_entries: When a frontend component reads a field from a backend response and we want to lock that contract: add the endpoint path + method + the field names it reads. Keep the list to fields that, if undefined, would break the UI (not speculative future-use).
_doc.owner: Session 210 coach plan. Expand over time — seed below covers the critical dashboard flows observed as highest-blast-radius during the 2026-04 audits.

contracts.rationale: Uptime monitors poll this. Must return {status: 'ok'}.
CI post-deploy gate + drift detection depend on this exact shape. See main.py VersionResponse.
